name: Cocoa Fudge Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Hershey's cocoa or European style cocoa
recipeInstructions:
In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the butter. Add the cocoa and stir constantly until the mixture begins to boil. Remove from heat and pour into a small mixing bowl. Gradually add powdered sugar with milk, beating until reaching a spreading consistency. Blend in vanilla. Spread frosting while warm. Approximately 2-1/4 cups frosting.
Variation:
Peppermint: Add 1 tablespoon finely crushed peppermint candy to the frosting mixture.
